evals.expected_output: API reference documentation for GET /users/:id including: path parameter table, authentication required note, response body schema with field descriptions and types, error responses (401, 404), and a curl example.
expectations: Path parameter 'id' is documented with type and description
Response body is documented with all fields (id, email, name, role, createdAt) and types
401 error response is documented (due to authMiddleware)

evals.prompt: Write API documentation for our payments API. We have: POST /payments (creates a payment with amount, currency, source), GET /payments/:id (get payment status), POST /payments/:id/refund (refund a payment). Auth is via API key in x-api-key header.
evals.expected_output: Structured API reference with Authentication section (API key), and documentation for all three endpoints including request bodies, response schemas, error codes, and examples for create payment, get payment, and refund.
expectations: POST /payments documents amount, currency, source request fields
GET /payments/:id documents the payment status response
POST /payments/:id/refund is documented with appropriate request/response
Error responses are documented for each endpoint
At least one curl example is provided per endpoint
